title: Scandal at Scourie
writer: Norman Corwin, Leonard Spigelgass, Karl Tunberg
actors: Greer Garson, Walter Pidgeon, Agnes Moorehead
plot: After their orphanage burns down, a group of children are being transported west by train to Manitoba. All of them are available for adoption and at a stop at Scourie, Ontario little Patsy meets Victoria McChesney. Victoria and he...
